moments.matchContext: El Clasico breakthrough — Warner dismissed in a high-voltage PSL 11 clash
moments.name: Shaheen Breaks Through — Warner Dismissed — PSL 11 Match 06
moments.description: Shaheen Shah Afridi provides the breakthrough for Lahore Qalandars, dismissing the dangerous David Warner in a high-voltage El Clasico between Karachi Kings and Lahore Qalandars.

moments.matchContext: Shaheen's 4th wicket ignites an epic Lahore Qalandars comeback against Karachi Kings
moments.name: Shaheen's 4th Wicket — Epic Comeback Ignited — PSL 11 Match 06
moments.description: Shaheen Shah Afridi picks up his fourth wicket of the spell, setting the stage for a stunning Lahore Qalandars comeback against their fiercest rivals, Karachi Kings.

moments.rarityNote: Fast bowler catch off own bowling
moments.matchContext: A once-in-a-generation moment — Mir Hamza grabs a bullet-paced drive hit back at him
moments.name: Mir Hamza's Bullet Catch — PSL 11 Match 06
moments.description: A once-in-a-generation moment. Mir Hamza pulls off a spectacular catch as a fast bowler, grabbing a bullet-paced drive hit directly back at him. A moment very rarely seen in cricket.

moments.matchContext: Gritty half-century on a treacherous pitch where most batters couldn't reach double figures
moments.name: Kusal Perera's Gritty Half-Century — PSL 11 Match 15
moments.description: On a treacherous pitch where most batters couldn't reach double figures, Kusal Perera stood firm at one end and completed his half-century in style. A masterclass in temperament and skill.

moments.matchContext: 3rd wicket in the over — a loud message to national selectors on the big stage
moments.name: Sufyan Muqeem's National Team Statement — PSL 11 Match 15
moments.description: Sufyan Muqeem takes his 3rd wicket of the over, sending a loud and clear message to the national selectors. A spell that announced his arrival on the big stage.

moments.matchContext: Last-over heroics — Iftikhar seals Peshawar Zalmi's victory with a four and a six
moments.name: Iftikhar Seals It — Last Over Heroics — PSL 11 Match 15
moments.description: Iftikhar Ahmad leads Peshawar Zalmi to victory with a brilliant last-over knock, sealing the win with a four and a six. A captain's innings when it mattered most.

moments.matchContext: 5th over — 3rd wicket in the over, 4th of the spell. Part-time bowler dismantles Hyderabad Kingsmen
moments.name: Iftikhar's Four-Wicket Blitz — PSL 11 Match 15
moments.description: The fifth over of the first innings and Iftikhar Ahmad, a part-time bowler, has taken his 4th wicket — his 3rd in the over — as Hyderabad Kingsmen collapse to lose their fourth wicket. A legendary bowling display from an unlikely hero.
